Text: Arrive in the Manor House Courtyard
Arrive in the manor house courtyard
Oof, that must've hurt! Hang in there!
Not fast enough, I'm afraid!
Even I felt that! Can't afford to be careless, now!
A direct hit! But they're still standing!
Impressive footwork on display today!
And they dance out of the way unharmed! Unbelievable!
Another attack evaded with aplomb!
Once again they slip beyond their opponent's reach!
Oh no, they've been felled with a vengeance!
And they're down! Can they recover from this?
They're up! What fighting spirit!
And they're back in action! Can they turn the tide!?
With Fenrir's might, I rouse a storm!
This has gone on long enough. Victory is mine!
No, I will not lose... I need more power!
Fenrir's unbound might!
No matter what becomes of my body...defeat is not an option!
Something's amiss... What does he intend to do!?
Egads! The ring's been destroyed, and they've fallen below!

They've moved to floating deathtraps!
How will they fight with so little room?
Now I fight with everything I have! Prepare yourself!
I will rend all asunder!
You'll have nowhere to stand!
He's destroyed an isle! It'll take time to restore it!
The power of wind unleashed!
You cannot escape from the wolf!
I will draw upon my all to defeat you!
Even if it costs me my life...
Neither side is holding back, but there can be only one champion!
I will prevail!
You're strong, I admit... But I'm the one who will win!
Dodge this if you can!
Will you be able to stay on your feet?
Aaarrrgh!
Thank you for agreeing to help decorate the cakes, kupo!
'Tis a simple matter of carrying the ingredients from the shelves around the room to the central cake stands.
There is, of course, the matter of the mammet pâtissiers. Should they spot you, use the whistle to temporarily disable them!
First up: one <Sheet(ValentionSweetsRecipe,IntegerParameter(1),0)/>, if you please!
Ready, steady...decorate!
Once you have an ingredient in hand, bring it to the cake stand in the center, kupo!
Take care to avoid the mammet pâtissiers!
All that remains is to decorate the cake!
The <Sheet(ValentionSweetsRecipe,IntegerParameter(1),0)/> is halfway to completion!
The <Sheet(ValentionSweetsRecipe,IntegerParameter(1),0)/> is almost complete!
The ingredients are on shelves around the room! Fetch the ingredients in the recipe, kupo!
Collect the required ingredients and decorations to add the finishing touches to as many cakes as you can.
The mammets are moving more quickly. Take care, kupo!
Kupopo! Watch out─the mammets seem even madder than before!
The <Sheet(ValentionSweetsRecipe,IntegerParameter(1),0)/> is complete! And what a fine cake it looks!
Next, let us see if we can create a <Sheet(ValentionSweetsRecipe,IntegerParameter(1),0)/>!
It's the final cake! Let your inspiration guide you!
Choose the frosting, decorations, and cake toppers that make your heart sing!
I believe we're out of time, kupo!
But we haven't much time, kupo... Make haste!
I believe we're out of time, kupo!
The final cake is decorated splendidly, kupo!
<Unknown2D>FF07022903EA0203</Unknown2D> Recipe
Add <Highlight>StringParameter(1)</Highlight>
Add <Highlight>StringParameter(1)</Highlight>
Add <Highlight>StringParameter(1)</Highlight>
Add <Highlight>StringParameter(1)</Highlight>
Thank you for your wonderful help, kupo! I can hardly wait to complete our delivery...
Everyone has their off days─do not take it to heart!
To think you'd decorate five whole cakes... You have proven yourself the master of confection and affection alike, kupo!
Four cakes is quite something. You have a knack for cake decorating, kupo!
Three cakes, kupo! This should be a feast!
Two cakes─this makes you a fully fledged pâtissier, kupo!
This cake shall more than suffice. As long as you put your heart into it, you've captured the spirit of Valentione's Day, kupo!
Our guests will be most delighted. Let us return to the festivities posthaste!
The ingredients you need are no doubt twinkling with anticipation, kupo!
Clear the path of threats
Rescue the citizens
Find the source of the screams
Defeat the greater behemoth
Best make sure the evacuation route is clear first...
Done! Now to aid those people by the canal...
Help is on the way!
There may be other stragglers...
That breeze is awfully warm... Oh no!
First things first─the fire!
Not a moment too soon... I hope that was the worst of it.
A voice...further out!
Somebody, help!
I'll take care of this─make for shelter!
How many are there...?
Thunderheads...
Keep away from the clouds!
If I never see another storm...
Nowhere is safe with so many of them...
Some friendly winds, if you please!
It worked!
Grrroooaaar!
The levin grows more volatile... Something is coming.
Ball lightning!
Y'shtola, Sphene─lend me your strength!
The two of us will disperse these balls of lightning!
Take cover behind the spriggan!
The tide is turning. Press the attack!
H-Heeelp!
Our home...
I can still fight! I can!
I have no doubt!
How fortunate that bird made such an impression.
Just keep the lightning at bay a little longer!
Traverse Quan Caverns
Defeat the Treno catoblepas
Traverse the Treno lowlands
Defeat Amdusias
Traverse the streets of Treno
Defeat the thundergust griffin
No matter how many come, we fight hand in hand! Forevermore!

君たち、旅人さんか！？
みんな街の奥へ避難してるから、そこを目指すといい！
